title: A full Tristan MacAvery version of the series
display_title: A full Tristan MacAvery version of the series
wikitext:
[]: A full Tristan MacAvery version of the series             Quote Post by pwnsweet » Fri May 16, 2014 2:41 am "Oh God, why on EARTH would you want to watch the series in English ? Are you insane!?"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 16, 2014 10:24 am There's only one solution here: find Tristan MacAvery, and have him voice the characters. All the characters. Announcer voice: Tristan MacAvery is Shinji Ikari, Tristan MacAvery is Asuka Langley Soryu, Tristan MacAvery is Gendo Ikari, Tristan MacAvery is Tristan MacAvery .

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri May 16, 2014 11:49 am Tristan MacAvery voicing Rei as Gendo sticks his hand into Rei. Oh, baby.

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri May 16, 2014 12:08 pm Can you imagine him voicing Pen Pen?
